title: COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH - 211info
text: PRINEVILLE MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide mental health assessments, counseling services, psychiatry (including evaluation), medication management, nursing support,and crisis intervention. Ofers mental health treatment groups, including weekly gender-specific DBT (Dialectical Behavioral Therapy) groups. 1059 NW Madras Highway Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 323-5330 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 323-5330 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call or email for information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees and payment plans may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English; Spanish and ASL interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GAMBLING MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WRAPAROUND SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PRINEVILLE MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES
